articles.title: Foden, Palmer, Alexander-Arnold to miss World Cup
articles.description: Phil Foden, Cole Palmer and Trent Alexander-Arnold have not been included in Thomas Tuchel's 26-man England squad for this summer's World Cup.

articles.title: Teen boys' rape sentences to be reviewed by government
articles.description: The three teenagers avoided custodial sentences for their roles in the rape of two girls.

articles.title: UK scientists developing Ebola vaccine that could be ready for trials in months
articles.description: The rare species of Ebola involved - known as Bundibugyo - kills around a third of those infected and has no proven vaccine yet.

articles.title: Parents of Southport survivors say anonymity has erased their girls from the story
articles.description: The BBC has spoken to parents of some of the children who survived the knife attack, who believe they have been given insufficient support because of the anonymity order.

articles.title: Pemain kurang fokus jadi penyebab PSIM dikalahkan Arema
articles.description: Pelatih PSIM Yogyakarta Jean Paul Van Gastel menyatakan kekalahan 3-1 dari Arema FC di Stadion Kanjuruhan, Kabupaten ...

articles.description: Menteri Luar Negeri Amerika Serikat Marco Rubio pada Jumat mengatakan bahwa pihaknya melihat Swedia sebagai sekutu ...

articles.title: Herdman anggap Oman dan Mozambik ujian bagus untuk timnas
articles.description: Pelatih timnas Indonesia John Herdman memberikan komentarnya soal dua laga tim Garuda pada FIFA Match Day melawan Oman ...

articles.title: Rubio desak NATO berkomitmen tingkatkan produksi pertahanan
articles.description: Menteri Luar Negeri Amerika Serikat Marco Rubio pada Jumat mendesak negara-negara anggota NATO untuk berkomitmen ...
